fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: From Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first item entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the last entry line you included before you posted the entries in the journal.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which you posted the entries in the journal.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch, a personalized journal layout, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Creation Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time on which you posted the entries in the journal.
